name: Twikipedia
description: '''Laura Almeida''' (born {{Birth date|2004|5|16|df=yes}}), known professionally as '''Twikipedia''' or '''Key vs. Locket''' (both stylized in [[lowercase]]), is a Brazilian rapper, singer-songwriter and record producer from [[Niterói]], [[Rio de Janeiro]]. Almeida originally emerged as a figure in the [[digicore]] scene. In 2024, she released the [[shoegaze]]-inspired EP ''Still-Life'' and album ''For the Rest of Your Life.''
